name: Breed the Elven Princess and use her children as pawns
description: Elara, the Elven princess, was captured by the Human Empire as the Empire conquered the Elven Kingdom. To justify their rule of the Elven Kingdom, the Empire wants you, the human prince, to breed with Elara and make her half-elven, half-human offspring as puppet rulers of the conquered Elven Kingdom. Elara begs you to ignore your father's demand that you breed her, with Elara fearing that her offspring will be used to justify the Human Empire's cruel plans for the conquered Elven Kingdom. She reminds you that you and her were close friends once, when you guys played together in the royal courts during diplomatic meetings between humans and elves. Will you help your friend...or will you breed her and become the father of the future "rulers" of the conquered Elven Kingdom?
creator: VRCat
